name: Pagination
description: Display active page and navigate between multiple pages
searchText: pagination display active page and navigate between multiple pages @mantine/core /core/pagination autocontrast boundaries color defaultvalue disabled dotsicon firsticon gap getcontrolprops getitemprops hidewithonepage lasticon nexticon onchange onfirstpage onlastpage onnextpage onpreviouspage previousicon radius siblings size startvalue total value withcontrols withedges withpages autocontrast boundaries color defaultvalue disabled getitemprops onchange onfirstpage onlastpage onnextpage onpreviouspage radius siblings size startvalue total value icon icon icon icon dotsicon icon active withpadding

props.name: autoContrast
props.description: If set, adjusts text color based on the active page background color to ensure sufficient contrast

props.name: boundaries
props.description: Number of elements visible on the left/right edges

props.name: color
props.description: Key of theme.colors, active item color

props.name: defaultValue
props.description: Active page for uncontrolled component, must be an integer in [1, total] interval

props.name: disabled
props.description: Disables all controls, applies disabled styles

props.name: dotsIcon
props.description: Dots icon component

props.name: firstIcon
props.description: First control icon component

props.name: gap
props.description: Key of theme.spacing, gap between controls

props.name: getControlProps
props.description: Props passed down to next/previous/first/last controls

props.name: getItemProps
props.description: Additional props passed down to controls

props.name: hideWithOnePage
props.description: If set, the pagination is hidden when only one page is available (total={1})

props.name: lastIcon
props.description: Last control icon component

props.name: nextIcon
props.description: Next control icon component

props.name: onChange
props.description: Called when page changes

props.name: onFirstPage
props.description: Called when first page control is clicked

props.name: onLastPage
props.description: Called when last page control is clicked

props.name: onNextPage
props.description: Called when next page control is clicked

props.name: onPreviousPage
props.description: Called when previous page control is clicked

props.name: previousIcon
props.description: Previous control icon component

props.name: radius
props.description: Key of theme.radius or any valid CSS value to set border-radius, numbers are converted to rem

props.name: siblings
props.description: Number of siblings displayed on the left/right side of the selected page

props.name: size
props.description: height and min-width of controls

props.name: startValue
props.description: Starting page number, defaults to 1

props.name: total
props.description: Total number of pages, must be an integer

props.name: value
props.description: Active page for controlled component, must be an integer in [1, total] interval

props.name: withControls
props.description: If set, next/previous controls are displayed

props.name: withEdges
props.description: If set, first/last controls are displayed

props.name: withPages
props.description: If set to false, page number buttons are hidden, only next/previous controls remain
